caption: A man with blonde hair and glasses wearing a dark blue t-shirt is positioned in a small inset window in the bottom left of the scene. He is in a room with a white brick wall, a decorated Christmas tree with blue and green lights, and a microphone in front of him. He is talking and gesturing with his hands, smiling throughout the sequence. To the right of the inset is a large, stylized digital sports card with a purple background. The card features a football player in a white and red uniform with the number "83" on his jersey. Text on the card reads "FB," "80 OVR," and "ANDREW BECK." Two small logos, including one for the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, are visible on the card. As the sequence progresses, the man's expressions and hand movements shift slightly while the sports card remains static.
